message:
fix(security): harden PID hint file against symlink attacks + SQL identifier validation

startup_checks.rs:
- Set PID hint directory to 0o700 (owner-only) to prevent symlink planting
- Write via temp file + atomic rename to close TOCTOU symlink race window
- Remove stale files before writing

robot.rs:
- Validate table_ref and release_alias are safe SQL identifiers
  (alphanumeric + underscore only) before string interpolation into SQL
- Prevents SQL injection via crafted table alias names
- Falls back to safe defaults ("file_reservations", "frl") on invalid input

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
